key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh system metrics, in seconds (1–300).

key.name: network-unit
key.description: Display network speed in "bytes" (KB/s, MB/s) or "bits" (kbps, Mbps).

key.name: panel-position
key.description: Where to place the indicator in the top panel: "far-left" (start of the left box), "left" (end of the left box), "right" (start of the right box) or "far-right" (end of the right box).

key.name: show-cpu
key.description: Whether to show CPU usage percentage in the panel.

key.name: show-memory
key.description: Whether to show memory usage percentage in the panel.

key.name: show-disk
key.description: Whether to show disk usage percentage in the panel.

key.name: show-temperature
key.description: Whether to show device temperature in the panel.

key.name: show-network
key.description: Whether to show network download/upload speed in the panel.

key.name: show-cpu-card
key.description: Whether to show the CPU card in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-memory-card
key.description: Whether to show the memory card in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-disk-card
key.description: Whether to show the disk usage card in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-external-disks
key.description: Whether the disk card also lists removable and external drives (USB, SD cards and anything auto-mounted under /run/media, /media or /mnt).

key.name: show-temperature-card
key.description: Whether to show the temperature card in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-network-card
key.description: Whether to show the network card in the dropdown menu.

key.name: show-icons
key.description: Whether to show icons next to metric values in the panel.
